launchObservations.finding: V588 recommends proceeding to activation review but does not activate Montgomery or approve production activation.
launchObservations.impact: V589 or later must make any activation decision explicitly.

launchObservations.finding: GRIDLY_MONTGOMERY_RUNTIME_GATE remains false and Montgomery remains non-operational, production-disabled, and non-selectable.
launchObservations.impact: Runtime behavior remains unchanged and Liberty remains the production baseline.

launchObservations.finding: Rollback procedure, validation, and evidence exist; ownership assumptions are documented and should be reconfirmed before activation.
launchObservations.impact: No blocker to activation review, but V589 should verify live ownership and escalation expectations.

launchRisks.risk: Future runtime or county-selection changes could weaken Montgomery containment if not validated with the V584-V587 coverage.
launchRisks.mitigation: Require all Montgomery runtime tests, V584-V587 audits, protected-boundary validation, and artifact parse validation before any activation decision.

launchRisks.risk: Moving Montgomery assets into production-consumable data paths without authorization could create unintended production behavior.
launchRisks.mitigation: Keep Montgomery assets under assets/county-implementation/montgomery/ until a later milestone explicitly authorizes promotion and validates it.

launchRisks.risk: Activation-review work could accidentally couple Montgomery with historical systems, DriveTexas, Transportation Intelligence, Supabase, or migrations.
launchRisks.mitigation: Preserve explicit protected-system false/paused states and rerun protected-boundary audits during V589.

unresolvedItems: Production activation is not approved by V588.
Montgomery remains disabled staged until separate activation-review authorization.
Operational owner, rollback owner, support owner, and escalation owner assumptions require V589 reconfirmation before any launch authorization.
